name: Matzo Brie
directions: beat eggs well and add milk.
season salt and pepper.
Wash the matzos under running water, and break into pieces into the egg mixture.
Melt butter in frying pan, and add to matzo mixture.
Cook over medium heat.
When one side is browned, flip the Matzo Brie over with the help of a plate.
Cook other side for 5- 6 minutes until browned.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.

similar.name: Passover Poached Eggs over Matzoh and Guacamole
Spinach Cheese Scramble, W/Soy Bacon, Potatoes

name: Fluffy Cottage Cheese Pancakes
directions: Mix all ingredients together in large bowl.
There is no need to overmix this batter as the lumps will disappear when cooked.
Drop onto hot griddle or pan to make pancakes.
When bubbling on top, turn to complete.
Serve immediately with the syrup of your choice and/or dust with confectioner's sugar.

similar.name: Passover Poached Eggs over Matzoh and Guacamole

name: Macadamia Nut Granola
directions: Mix together all dry ingredients.
Mix oil, honey, vanilla extract in a small saucepan.
Heat and bring to boil, then remove from heat.
Stir into dry ingredients until well combined.
Preheat oven to 170 degrees celcius.
Spread mixture onto to two baking trays lined with baking paper.
Bake 15 minutes stirring every so often.
Remove from oven and allow to cool.
Store in airtight container.

name: Hash Browns Quiche
directions: Press excess water out of thawed hash brown patties.
Press patties into an 8 x 8 baking pan.
Brush with butter and bake for 1/2 hour at 350°F.
Mix egg and half and half well.
Layer soy sausage and cheese on baked hash browns.
Pour egg mixture over.
Continue baking until cheese begins to melt and egg is set, approximately 40 more minutes.

similar.name: Passover Poached Eggs over Matzoh and Guacamole
Spinach Cheese Scramble, W/Soy Bacon, Potatoes

name: Chocolate Pancakes
directions: In a large mixing bowl or a food processor fitted with the steel blade, combine flours, cocoa, sugar, baking powder, salt. Mix well.
Add the eggs, milk, water oil, and vanilla. Whisk together, or process 8-10 seconds, or until smooth and blended. Using the rubber spatula, mix in the chocolate chips.
Spray a large nonstick frying pan or griddle with cooking spray and heat over medium heat.
Drop the batter, using a scant 1/4 cup for each pancake, into the frying pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until bubbles appear on the top. Turn pancakes with a rubber spatula and lightly brown for 2-3 minutes.
Repeat with remaining batter. Because chocolate chips tend to sink to the bottom of the batter stir often. Serve pancakes warm with berries or yogurt.

similar.name: Passover Poached Eggs over Matzoh and Guacamole

name: Gluten Free Pesach Blintzes
directions: Mix all ingredients and cook in a greased pan until bubbly on one side.
Flip and cook on the other side for approximately 30 seconds.
Mix the filling ingredients together and fill and roll blintzes.
To make Savory blintzes decrease sugar to 1 tablespoon and omit vanilla.
You may fill savory blintzes with mashed potatoes, cheese, broccoli, or any other fillings of your choice.

similar.name: Passover Poached Eggs over Matzoh and Guacamole
Spinach Cheese Scramble, W/Soy Bacon, Potatoes

name: Pesach Breakfast Bars
directions: 1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.  Grease a cake pan.
2. Mix together the milk and lemon juice.  Set aside for 5 minutes.
3. In medium size mixing bowl, mix together the egg, agave nectar, oil, and extracts, zucchini, carrots.
4. Pour in the milk/lemon mixture and mix well.
5. Add the the cake meal, cinnamon, baking soda and mix well.
6. Mix in the cashew butter.
7. Gently stir in the blueberries.

8. Spoon into cake pan and smooth with a spatula.  Sprinkle the nuts on top and gently press into the batter. (Now I personally do not like nuts in my baked goods, so this way I can pick them off the top and eat the bar sans nuts.  However, you can just as easily add the nuts to the mix and bake them in.).
9. Cover with foil and bake for 45-50 minutes or until you can insert a knife into the center and it comes out clean.
10. Optional - remove the foil and bake another 5 minutes if you would like for it to be more crispy.

similar.name: Passover Poached Eggs over Matzoh and Guacamole

name: Rock Bun
directions: Combine butter and sugar, mix well
Add egg and vanilla.
Stir in flour, baking powder, raisins, and spices
Roll into buns
Bake at 350*F till done, about 30 minutes.

name: Gluten Free Pancakes
directions: Combine the dry ingredients in a bowl big enough to give some mixing and expansion room.

Add the wet ingredients and stir just enough to make all the dry ingredients wet.  Melt the coconut oil if it is solid; very little heat should be needed.  A few lumps are not a problem.  Overmixing is likely to release some of the bubbles you want to make your pancakes light.
Warm a griddle or large skillet over medium heat, the same temperature you used to use for wheat pancakes.  Add your favorite oil or grease then spoon out pancakes.  Turn when the bubbles stay open.

name: Crockpot Yogurt
directions: Into your scrupulously clean slow cooker, place your milk. Heat on low until it reaches 185-195°F, 2 to 2 1/2 hours.

In a large measuring cup, sprinkle gelatin over cold water and let stand 15 minutes until bloomed. Add a few ladles of warm milk and whisk until gelatin is dissolved. Pour into the slow cooker and turn down to "keep warm" for 3 hours. (If your cooker does not have a "keep warm" setting, turn the cooker off and wrap it well in several layers of towels. Unwrap it and turn it back on low for the last 30-60 minutes of this time span.). It should be between 122-130°F before proceeding; if it's too warm, turn it off and let it cool.

In the same large measuring cup, place the yogurt. Add a few ladles of hot milk and whisk until smooth. Pour into crockpot and whisk to combine completely. Turn off pot and wrap in several layers of towels/blanket to trap the heat. (Do not use the keep warm setting at this point; it's too hot, and will kill the yogurt cultures.).

Divide into serving portions. You can flavor with fruit, jam or honey now, or when serving. A thicker Greek-style yogurt can be achieved by using whole milk, then scooping the finished yogurt into cheesecloth and allowing it to drain (in the refrigerator, suspended over a bowl) for 2-4 hours.

similar.name: Spinach Cheese Scramble, W/Soy Bacon, Potatoes
Passover Poached Eggs over Matzoh and Guacamole

name: Oatmeal Banana Pudding
directions: Preheat oven at 350.
Combine the first four ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
Add the egg white, stir, and then mix in the banana.
Pour into a greased Pyrex dish and bake for 30 minutes, or until all liquid has evaporated.

name: Spinach Cheese Scramble, W/Soy Bacon, Potatoes
directions: Melt coconut oil in nonstick frying pan add sliced plantain and fry until brown, turn over and press down until each is flat and cook until brown. Drain on paper towel and set aside.
Fry soy bacon next to the plantain at the same time, drain on paper towel it should be crisp.

Using same pan/oil drop in sliced potatoes and fry until brown and crunchy. Sprinkle with garlic salt save on paper towel. (My toaster oven has a warmer on top so I place these items in there until the rest of the food is cooked.).

Pour egg into pan and cook half way. Add spinach and cheese. Chop up and stir until eggs are done. Serve the eggs fluffy, take the scrapings from the bottom of the pan which will be brown and crunchy and serve it over the potatoes.
Serve all together - use hot sauce to taste.

similar.name: Passover Poached Eggs over Matzoh and Guacamole

name: Passover Poached Eggs over Matzoh and Guacamole
directions: Mash the avocado.
Add the lemon juice, tomato, onion,, and salt to the avocado and mix.
Spread guacamole over the matzoh.
To poach the egg, bring a pot of water to boil.
Add vinegar to the boiling water.

Break in the egg to the boiling water.  Turn off the heat. Allow the egg to sit for 3-7 minutes (depending on whether you prefer your eggs runny or more solid).  Remove the poached egg from the water and place it on top of the guacamole.  Serve immediately.

similar.name: Spinach Cheese Scramble, W/Soy Bacon, Potatoes
